name: Wainwright Inn Puffed Pancake with Black Cherries & Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475°F.
2. Whisk together eggs, milk, lemon rind, and vanilla in a bowl until combined.
3. Gradually add flour and beat the mixture until it forms a smooth batter.
4. Melt butter in a greased baking dish by placing it in the preheated oven.
5. Pour the batter into the melted butter and spread evenly.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with powdered sugar and lemon juice.
8. Serve with black cherries, almonds, and additional powdered sugar on top.
Makes 8 servings.
